name: Mystery Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the bitter chocolate and butter together.
2. Add 3/4 cup of sugar, flour, baking powder, and salt to the melted chocolate and butter mixture. Blend well until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, combine milk and vanilla extract. Mix well.
4. Gradually add the milk and vanilla mixture to the chocolate mixture, stirring continuously to ensure everything is well incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a greased pan.
6. Sprinkle brown sugar and cocoa evenly over the top of the batter.
7. Pour coffee over the top of the cake batter.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes.
9. Serve warm or cold with whipped cream.
